---
title: "MP_1"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(tidytext)
covid_tweet<-read.csv("covid19_tweets.csv")
```

```{r}
covid_tweet_un <- covid_tweet |>
  mutate(line = row_number()) |>
  unnest_tokens(word, text, token = "words") 
```

```{r}
covid_tweet_un_imp<-covid_tweet_un|>
  mutate(has_covid_hashtag = str_detect(hashtags, "Covid"))|>
  filter(has_covid_hashtag== TRUE)|>
  filter(user_followers>1000)
```
